Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. I Built an Open-World Engine for the N64 [video] 80 upvotes, 5 comments
  2. ISBN Visualization 193 upvotes, 30 comments
  3. Desperately Seeking Space Friends 23 upvotes, 1 comments
  4. Paper Tape Is All You Need – Training a Transformer on a 1976 Minicomputer 42 upvotes, 4 comments
  5. Meow.camera 297 upvotes, 65 comments
  6. Matadisco – Decentralized Data Discovery 27 upvotes, 3 comments
  7. Nashville library launches Memory Lab for digitizing home movies 161 upvotes, 40 comments
  8. Velxio 2.0 – Emulate Arduino, ESP32, and Raspberry Pi 3 in the Browser 167 upvotes, 46 comments
  9. Cocoa-Way – Native macOS Wayland compositor for running Linux apps seamlessly 130 upvotes, 38 comments
  10. I put all 8,642 Spanish laws in Git – every reform is a commit 237 upvotes, 81 comments
  11. The bee that everyone wants to save 160 upvotes, 53 comments
  12. Byte Interviews Chuck Peddle, Father of the MOS 6502 and Commodore PET (1982) 13 upvotes, 1 comments
  13. Arm releases first in-house chip, with Meta as debut customer 41 upvotes, 10 comments
  14. Anatomy of the .claude/ folder 524 upvotes, 231 comments
  15. Go Naming Conventions: A Practical Guide 38 upvotes, 10 comments
  16. You Do Not, in Fact, Have to Hand It to Them 11 upvotes, 1 comments
  17. LG's new 1Hz display is the secret behind a new laptop's battery life 274 upvotes, 133 comments
  18. CERN uses tiny AI models burned into silicon for real-time LHC data filtering 164 upvotes, 82 comments
  19. AMD's Ryzen 9 9950X3D2 Dual Edition crams 208MB of cache into a single chip 212 upvotes, 113 comments
  20. Go hard on agents, not on your filesystem 436 upvotes, 255 comments
  21. Show HN: Twitch Roulette – Find live streamers who need views the most 147 upvotes, 78 comments
  22. Make macOS consistently bad unironically 456 upvotes, 322 comments
  23. Improved Git Diffs with Delta, Fzf and a Little Shell Scripting 7 upvotes, 1 comments
  24. Britain today generating 90%+ of electricity from renewables 128 upvotes, 88 comments
  25. A single-file C allocator with explicit heaps and tuning knobs 22 upvotes, 10 comments
  26. How to implement the Outbox pattern in Go and Postgres 4 upvotes, 0 comments
  27. No one is happy with NASA's new idea for private space stations 38 upvotes, 23 comments
  28. ‘Energy independence feels practical’: Europeans building mini solar farms 320 upvotes, 294 comments
  29. Iran-linked hackers breach FBI director's personal email 311 upvotes, 425 comments
  30. Toma (YC W24) is hiring a Senior/Staff Eng to build AI automotive coworkers 0 upvotes, 0 comments

Last generated 10:00pm, 28 March 2026. Source here.
